name: Albion Mutual — Attachment Vision API (photos & documents)
_comment: Lets claimants attach photos/documents in the Ava chat. The image is sent to OpenAI vision (gpt-4o-mini), which extracts the claim-relevant content (damage, visible text, amounts, dates, reg plates). The extracted summary is stored in jeen.attachments and returned to the web app, which feeds it into Ava's conversation so her triage takes the evidence into account. This is how real claims use photos and documents.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', max_tokens: 320, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: 'You are an insurance claims assistant. Look at this attached photo or document and describe, concisely and factually, only what is relevant to an insurance claim: the type of damage or the item, plus any visible text, amounts, dates, registration plates or reference numbers. If it does not look claim-related, say so in one line.' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.body.image_base64 } } ] } ] } }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO jeen.attachments(session_id, filename, mime, summary) VALUES('{{ $json.session_id }}', '{{ $json.filename }}', '{{ $json.mime }}', '{{ $json.summary }}');

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, filename: $('Extract Summary').item.json.filename, summary: $('Extract Summary').item.json.summary_raw }) }}
